shared_attributes.position: center of 128x128 screen, on perch at y=60
shared_attributes.key_features: crest, cheek patch, tail - 3 essential cockatiel traits

context.game: Pico Echo - virtual pet cockatiel game
context.role: Triggered when player feeds Echo by tapping food bowl
context.screen_position: Center (x=64, y=60), head moves toward food bowl at (16, 100)
context.usage_scenario: Plays once when food is provided. Echo's head bobs down to food bowl, pecks seed, returns to idle. Increases happiness by 15 points.

visual_specification.shape: Cockatiel with head angled downward toward food bowl
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art with hand-drawn organic edges, no gradients

animation.description: Frame 1-3: Head gradually lowers toward food bowl. Frame 4: Beak opens (2px gap). Frame 5: Beak closes on seed. Frame 6: Head returns to neutral position. After animation completes, transitions to idle.

visual_specification.details: Head rotation: approximately 30-degree tilt downward in frames 2-5. Beak opens to 2px vertical gap in frame 4. Seed (3x3px #FFA300) visible in food bowl, disappears in frame 5. Body remains stationary, only head/neck moves.

relationships.shared_with: Same body structure as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_idle: head angled down vs neutral. echo_hungry: actively eating vs looking at empty bowl. Beak opens in this animation, closed in idle.

explicit_negations: Seed does not animate (static until consumed)
